message:
refactor: complete SessionHandle migration across codebase

Continuation of the thread-safe session architecture. Updates all
remaining session access points to work with Arc<Mutex<Session>>:

main.rs:
- Create session_arc at startup before AgentSession construction
- Acquire session lock for to_messages_for_current_path() call
- Acquire session lock in print mode for header serialization

interactive.rs:
- Remove redundant Arc::new(Mutex::new()) wrapper - session is already
  Arc<Mutex<Session>> from caller
- Remove eager session load in constructor (will be handled elsewhere)

rpc.rs:
- Add inner session lock for cycle_thinking_level current_model_entry
- Clone model entry to avoid holding lock across async boundary
- Pass reference to cloned entry for available_thinking_levels()

tests/auth_oauth_refresh_vcr.rs:
- Fix oauth_entry() pattern match (value.as_object() already returns Option)
- Remove trailing newline

VCR Cassettes (tests/fixtures/vcr/):
- oauth_refresh_success.json: Successful token refresh scenario
- oauth_refresh_expired.json: Expired refresh token scenario
- oauth_refresh_invalid.json: Invalid refresh token scenario
- oauth_refresh_network_failure.json: Network failure scenario

These cassettes enable deterministic testing of OAuth refresh flows
without making real API calls (bd-3pn).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
